summary: Update mode testing complete. All tests pass: 75 backend tests and 63 frontend E2E tests. Updated 2 existing specs (locations-places.spec.ts, dashboard-features.spec.ts) to reflect 'AI Assistant' rename to 'Unseen Servant'. Created new test spec for Unseen Servant feature (8 tests) and backend test suite for /api/unseen-servant/generate endpoint (12 tests).

minor.issue: HTTPExceptions (400, 404) are caught by generic Exception handler and re-raised as 500 with correct message embedded. Should re-raise HTTPException directly.

action_items: MINOR: Fix HTTPException handling in /api/unseen-servant/generate - currently returns 500 for validation errors (400/404) instead of proper status codes. The except Exception block should re-raise HTTPException instances directly.
seed_data_creation: Test data created dynamically with TEST_ prefix and UUIDs, cleaned up after tests. Uses existing test campaign 32fe976f-1dd0-4b17-a23b-42dbd1023d50.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Unseen Servant features tested and working. New spec file covers panel visibility, UI elements, validation messages, and rename verification across all tabs (Gods, NPCs, Locations, Campaign Setting). Backend tests verify god/npc/location/place_of_interest generation and auto-save to database. The only minor issue found is HTTPException handling returning 500 instead of proper 4xx status codes.

features_tested.unseen_servant_rename: PASS - All 'AI Assistant' text correctly renamed to 'Unseen Servant' across Gods, NPCs, Locations, Campaign Setting tabs
features_tested.unseen_servant_gods_tab: PASS - Panel visible, prompt textarea working, summon-god-btn present, validation error on empty prompt
features_tested.unseen_servant_npcs_tab: PASS - Panel visible, prompt textarea working, summon-npc-btn present, validation error on empty prompt
features_tested.unseen_servant_locations_tab: PASS - Panel visible with Location/Place toggle, prompt textarea, summon-location-btn present
features_tested.backend_god_generation: PASS - Generates and auto-saves god to database with correct structure
features_tested.backend_npc_generation: PASS - Generates and auto-saves NPC to database with correct structure
features_tested.backend_location_generation: PASS - Generates and auto-saves location to database
features_tested.backend_place_of_interest_generation: PASS - Generates and auto-saves place within specified location
